name: Grammar Multiply Postfix Range
description: digit*1.. — '*' is Multiply (FACTOR=6), '1..' is a postfix Range. FACTOR > RANGE (5 vs 11)? RANGE=11>FACTOR=6 so the range binds tighter on its operand, but here 1.. is a primary expression following *, producing Operator(Multiply, digit, Range(1,nil)).
